datasets.name: FLIR ADAS Thermal Dataset
datasets.notes: Annotated thermal frames with vehicle class labels. Registration required.

datasets.name: NASA FIRMS (Fire Information for Resource Management System)
datasets.notes: VIIRS/MODIS thermal anomaly data. OOD thermal — counters circular evaluation critique.

datasets.name: ESC-50: Dataset for Environmental Sound Classification
datasets.notes: 50 classes, 5-second clips. Classes of interest: gunshot, helicopter, airplane, engine, siren, dog bark, car horn, hand clap.

datasets.name: DroneAudioDataset
datasets.notes: UAV rotor audio recordings. 4 classes of drone signatures. C-UAS relevance.

datasets.name: MAD — Military Audio Dataset
datasets.notes: Nature Scientific Data 2024. 7 military audio classes. AF Phase I relevance.

datasets.name: NYU Depth V2
datasets.notes: Indoor depth maps. 1449 labeled images. Obstacle/spatial reasoning.

datasets.name: KITTI Vision Benchmark Suite (LiDAR)
datasets.notes: Outdoor LiDAR depth. OOD from NYU-D — counters domain overfitting. AF terrain mapping.

text_sources.description: Acoustic/thermal detection ranges for 6+ vehicle classes with distractor entries
IR persistence times for 5+ platform types after engine shutdown
Rotor counts, dimensions, MTOW for 8+ drone platforms
Standoff distances and response protocols for 6+ event types
Frequency bands and acoustic signatures for 8+ source types
Intrusion rules, detection thresholds for 5+ depth/terrain conditions
